text: AI just made this nineteen-year-old ten thousand dollars in thirty days.
Half of Gen Z is afraid AI will take their job. The other half is using AI to make ten K a month.
Three tools. Chat GPT to write. Eleven Labs for the voice. And one video tool. That's the entire stack. No experience needed.
One in three new online businesses started this year is run by someone under twenty-five. The fastest one hit ten K in its first month.
Send this to someone who still thinks AI will take their job.
